subject: Add Controller Register API to Orchestrator
commit_message:
Add Controller Register API to Orchestrator

Add API allows Controllers to register
themselves as gRPC servers consumed by
the orchestrator.

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-995
Signed-off-by: Marcus G K Williams <marcus.williams@intel.com>
Change-Id: I75946a4af711bf2e9d65f354923db494da667e70

Patch Set 2:

All of the API patches are going to conflict at api.go, projectHandler.go, main.go if they are designed/patterned after the current project API.

I think it's bad design when code is adding arguments to functions to ease testing, this is one of the reasons this code conflicts. Design of testing should be separate and not materially affect the design of production code.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

(1 comment)

I've tested this locally and can confirm mongodb additions with POST,PUT. mongodb deletes with DELETE and GETs also work.

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-2

Discussed this patch with Ritu. We agreed to change the name of the API to controllers.

Also storeName should be changed to collectionName and set to 'controllers'. This collectionName should be used to create new controllers and to read from the controllers. All of the controller API DB storage should be contained in controllers collection in mongoDB. We should not be creating a new collection per create as was done in project API.

Patch will be updated shortly.

Patch Set 10:

Does anyone know what is going on with the build env?

Patch Set 10:

> Patch Set 10:
> 
> Does anyone know what is going on with the build env?

Looks like VMs are using a new image and it doesn't have access to a python package:

"16 [EnvInject] - Variables injected successfully.
11:27:16 [rtdv3-global-verify-master] $ /bin/bash -l /tmp/jenkins76463889644586137.sh
11:27:16 ---> tox-run.sh
11:27:16 ---> Setting up pyenv
11:27:19 Traceback (most recent call last):
11:27:19   File "/usr/bin/tox", line 7, in <module>
11:27:19     from tox import cmdline
11:27:19   File "/usr/lib/python2.7/site-packages/tox/__init__.py", line 9, in <module>
11:27:19     import pluggy
11:27:19   File "/usr/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pluggy/__init__.py", line 16, in <module>
11:27:19     from .manager import PluginManager, PluginValidationError
11:27:19   File "/usr/lib/python2.7/site-packages/pluggy/manager.py", line 11, in <module>
11:27:19     import importlib_metadata
11:27:19   File "/usr/lib/python2.7/site-packages/importlib_metadata/__init__.py", line 9, in <module>
11:27:19     import zipp
11:27:19 ImportError: No module named zipp"

I'm going to go talk to Jessica and maybe submit a patch to images.
